name: Muze XR: Social Virtual Museum & Beyond

reviews.review_description: incredible concept. incredible for it being free but you go through the whole thing in about 10 minutes. would totally pay money for this though if there were weekly exhibits

While the app only has a few worlds to browse through, they all have incredible quality and each shows distinct artistic styles. I fully enjoyed my time there and am excited to see what more the creators and artists will create next! Definitely recommend!

The atmosphere is amazing! It’s rare to see such a detailed and realistic VR space. Can’t wait to explore more exhibition rooms in the future! The Theater is awesome—you can watch YouTube with friends, and it really feels like you're hanging out together in a cozy, immersive space. Love it! 🙌🎉
Computer museuem in VR with an Macintosh Emulator. Chef's Kiss.
Friendly and approachable developer who is always available to hear and improve upon user's feedback
